panels.description: Close up on a leather-bound journal cover with 'MINA HARKER'S JOURNAL - 1 NOVEMBER' written in elegant Victorian script, parchment texture, warm candlelit lighting.

Medium close up of Mina Harker sitting in a carriage, surrounded by fur coats and warm wraps. She looks distressed, holding her hands in prayer, with a faint scar visible on her forehead. Dim, moody lighting from a lantern.

bubbles.text: We are truly in the hands of God... I pray He watches over my beloved Jonathan.

panels.description: Wide shot of a horse-drawn carriage speeding through a scenic, mountainous landscape in autumn. Dr. Van Helsing is visible at the front, actively interacting with a local farmer to change horses.

bubbles.text: The horses run willingly. Dr. Van Helsing is tireless, driving us toward Bistritz with urgent focus.

panels.description: Close up of a local peasant woman recoiling slightly, crossing herself and pointing two fingers at Mina, who looks confused. A bowl of soup with visible garlic floating in it sits on the table between them.

bubbles.text: They fear the evil eye, even marking my scar with protective gestures. And the garlic... they put it in everything.
